q1.question: What type of construction projects do you handle?
q1.answer: We execute ventilated facades, fire-rated partitions, metal structures, attics, industrial gates, and other technical works for residential, commercial, and industrial buildings.

q2.question: Do you have your own workshop?
q2.answer: Yes, we have a modern workshop equipped with CNC machines for metal processing and custom component fabrication.

q3.question: Do you offer warranty?
q3.answer: All works are covered by warranty according to current legislation, and for certain systems we offer extended warranties through our partnerships.

q4.question: Do you work outside Bucharest?
q4.answer: Yes, we undertake projects throughout Romania and, selectively, in neighboring countries.

q5.question: How long does a typical project take?
q5.answer: Duration depends on complexity, but we provide detailed planning and clear timelines from the quotation phase.

ctaBand.title: Have a construction project in mind?

step1.description: Client interview, scenario evaluation, definition of required capabilities

whyUs.title: Why InterMax
whyUs.point1: Direct partnerships with global UAS and security system manufacturers
whyUs.point2: Experience in projects for public institutions and private clients
whyUs.point3: Operator certifications and work authorizations in controlled spaces
whyUs.point4: Capability to integrate with existing IT/OT infrastructures
whyUs.point5: Local technical support and rapid service for critical platforms

q1.question: What types of drones do you provide?
q1.answer: We offer multi-rotor platforms for tactical surveillance, fixed-wing for wide-area reconnaissance, and hybrid solutions, depending on needs.

q2.question: Do you provide operator training?
q2.answer: Yes, our courses cover piloting, safety procedures, legislation, and basic maintenance.

q3.question: Can you integrate systems with our existing infrastructure?
q3.answer: Yes, we have experience in C4ISR integration, command center connectivity, and synchronization with other sensors.

q4.question: Do you offer post-sales support?
q4.answer: We offer maintenance packages, authorized service, spare parts, and technological upgrades throughout the system's lifecycle.

q5.question: Do you work with government institutions?
q5.answer: Yes, we have experience in projects for MoD, MoI, and other government agencies, complying with all procurement and security procedures.

hero.title: Precision agriculture through aerial technology
hero.subtitle: Multispectral mapping, crop monitoring, vegetation analysis, and drone treatments for fast, precise field intervention.

mapping.title: Mapping & orthophotos
mapping.description: High-resolution imagery, 3D terrain models, precise plot delineation

ndvi.title: Multispectral analysis (NDVI, NDRE)
ndvi.description: Early detection of plant stress, crop vigor assessment, problem zone mapping

irrigation.title: Irrigation monitoring
irrigation.description: Identify under/over-irrigated zones, optimize water consumption, periodic reports

scouting.title: Scouting & inspection
scouting.description: Disease detection, pests, emergence gaps, damage assessment, tree inventory

consulting.title: Drone treatments
consulting.description: Precision spraying for phytosanitary treatments, foliar fertilization, and rapid field interventions

training.title: Training & know-how transfer
training.description: Internal team instruction, flight procedures, image processing, map interpretation

step1.title: Initial consultation
step1.description: Discuss objectives, assess area, establish flight frequency

step2.title: Flight & data acquisition
step2.description: Mission planning, RGB and multispectral image capture, AACR compliance

step3.title: Processing & analysis
step3.description: Orthophoto generation, vegetation index calculation, prescription map creation

step4.title: Reporting & action
step4.description: Deliver interactive reports, practical recommendations, implementation support

whyUs.title: Why InterMax
whyUs.point1: State-of-the-art multispectral sensors for precise detection
whyUs.point2: Professional software for agronomic processing and analysis
whyUs.point3: Collaboration with certified agronomists for data interpretation
whyUs.point4: Flexibility: on-demand flights or seasonal contracts
whyUs.point5: Clear, actionable reports adapted to client expertise level

projects.title: Precision agriculture - 500 ha
projects.description: Full monitoring and optimization system implemented for a cereal crop operation

projects.title: Pasture monitoring
projects.description: NDVI-based system for optimizing pasture and forage management

projects.title: Irrigation optimization
projects.description: Multispectral analysis for efficient water resource management

q1.question: What areas can you cover?
q1.answer: From a few hectares to thousands of hectares, depending on platform and available time.

q2.question: How often should flights be conducted?
q2.answer: Depends on crop and objective: typically every 10-14 days for vegetation monitoring, or as needed for specific investigations.

q3.question: Do you also offer drone spraying/treatment services?
q3.answer: Yes. We provide drone treatment and spraying services, including phytosanitary applications and foliar fertilization, depending on the crop, field area, and operating conditions.

q4.question: What deliverables do I receive?
q4.answer: Georeferenced orthophotos, NDVI/NDRE maps, analysis reports, agronomic recommendations, and access to online visualization platform.

q5.question: Can I use the data for APIA applications?
q5.answer: Yes, our orthophotos can be used as supporting documentation, but verify specific requirements with your consultant.

ctaBand.title: Want to optimize agricultural production with aerial data?
ctaBand.subtitle: Request a demonstration on your land and see the difference.

hero.title: Applied engineering for projects that demand rigor
hero.subtitle: InterMax brings together expertise in construction, defense engineering, and agricultural services for projects where technical clarity, controlled execution, and post-delivery support matter.

intro.title: Who we are
intro.subtitle: A technical company focused on delivery, not generic promises.
intro.paragraph1: InterMax is a team of engineers, technicians, and specialists working at the intersection of design, integration, and execution. We build solutions adapted to real operating conditions, whether the project involves technical buildings, security and defense systems, or agricultural operations supported by aerial technologies.
intro.paragraph2: Our approach stays consistent across all three divisions: we understand the requirement, define the technical solution, coordinate implementation, and stay involved through commissioning and support. We care about projects that are well executed, predictable, and sustainable over the long term.

snapshot.title: InterMax at a glance
snapshot.description: We apply the same technical discipline regardless of industry.
items: Three specialized divisions under one operational structure
Design, integration, execution, and support in one coherent flow
Clear communication with industrial, institutional, and private clients

pillars.title: What defines us
pillars.subtitle: The principles behind the way we work.

items.title: Multi-domain expertise
items.description: We combine construction, technical systems, and applied technology capabilities to solve complex projects.

items.title: From concept to delivery
items.description: We do not stop at recommendations. We follow the solution through implementation, testing, and handover.

items.title: Predictable collaboration
items.description: Clear communication, realistic planning, and careful coordination with every party involved.

items.title: Quality and compliance
items.description: We work with clear standards, execution control, and constant attention to industry-specific requirements.

divisions.title: The three InterMax divisions
divisions.subtitle: Each division addresses a different type of need, but all of them use the same project logic: rigor, integration, and accountability.

construction.title: Construction
construction.description: Technical systems for buildings and special facilities: facades, fire-rated partitions, metal structures, gates, and specialized execution works.

defense.title: Defense Engineering
defense.description: Integrated solutions for security, surveillance, and unmanned aerial systems, adapted to operational requirements and existing infrastructures.

agriculture.title: Agricultural services
agriculture.description: Mapping, multispectral analysis, and aerial monitoring for better decision-making in precision agriculture.

process.title: How we work
process.subtitle: A simple framework, adapted to each project but followed consistently.

step1.title: Analysis and clarification
step1.description: We understand the objectives, technical constraints, operational context, and real success criteria.

step2.title: Solution definition
step2.description: We establish the technical architecture, resources, project stages, and implementation method.

step3.title: Execution and integration
step3.description: We coordinate delivery, installation, configuration, and the checks required for reliable operation.

step4.title: Handover and support
step4.description: We stay involved through documentation, training, maintenance, and subsequent optimizations.

commitment.title: Our commitment
commitment.subtitle: Beyond technical capability, we follow a few simple principles in every collaboration.
points: We propose solutions that can be implemented realistically, not just presented well.
We adapt the level of complexity to the project's goals and budget.
We coordinate execution and cross-discipline collaboration carefully.
We respect the applicable quality, traceability, and safety standards.
We build long-term relationships through responsiveness and post-delivery support.

ctaBand.title: Do you have a project that needs a strong technical team?
ctaBand.subtitle: We can review the context, define the options, and build the right solution.

hero.title: Let's talk
hero.subtitle: Regardless of industry or project size, we're here to help.
